ground_truth.title: The Latest Cloud Computing Innovation Trends for 2025
ground_truth.author: Matt Pacheco
ground_truth.main_content: In TierPoint's 2025 Technology & IT Modernization Report for Mid-Sized Businesses, 99% of the 400+ IT decision-makers surveyed said they had plans to adopt or invest in emerging cloud technologies and strategies for their organizations over the next 12-24 months. This finding highlights the critical importance of cloud computing innovation for organizations seeking to establish a competitive edge by integrating the most cutting-edge digital technologies into their daily operations. Cloud computing innovation refers to the development or adoption of new and emerging cloud-based technologies, including hardware and software, cloud-based services, and operating models that empower organizations to enhance the capabilities, efficiency, and value of cloud-based services. The article explores seven key examples of cloud computing innovation including SaaS, IaaS, PaaS, containerization, container orchestration, IaC, and serverless computing. It then examines what's driving cloud innovation in 2025: artificial intelligence and machine learning, DevOps and CI/CD, cloud-native technologies, containerization, cloud-native security, multicloud and hybrid cloud management platforms, and high-density colocation. The piece concludes with emerging technologies shaping cloud computing's future such as energy-efficient cloud technologies, edge computing, quantum computing, AIOps and MLOps, and holographic cloud experiences.
with: 99% of the 400+ IT decision-makers surveyed said they had plans to adopt or invest in emerging cloud technologies and strategies for their organizations over the next 12-24 months.
Cloud computing innovation refers to the development or adoption of new and emerging cloud-based technologies, including hardware and software, cloud-based services, and operating models.
SaaS is a software delivery model where customers access a software application over the internet instead of installing it on local machines.
Containerization technology is a cloud computing innovation that has made it easier for developers to build applications that are portable across diverse environments.
Artificial intelligence and machine learning have been around for decades, but recent innovations in high-performance computing have made AI/ML more accessible and scalable than ever before.

items.caption: Matt Pacheco, Sr. Manager, Content Marketing Team - TierPoint
